description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build - Dev that runs on workflow dispatch, push to master branch (excluding tags starting with v), and pull requests to master. The workflow should have concurrency control, cancelling in-progress runs for non-master refs. It sets various environment variables and runs three jobs: linux-x64, win-x64, and osx-x64, each on an ubuntu-latest runner. Each job checks out the code, populates the environment, builds and packages, and uploads artifacts to GitHub. Additionally, the linux-x64 job logs in to Docker Hub and pushes the Docker image.
